nodes.title: FDM additive manufacturing
nodes.summary: Material-extrusion additive manufacturing commonly suited to inexpensive concepts, fixtures, and fit checks, with layer behavior and surface limitations that must match the function.

recommendations.statement: Use FDM as a candidate for low-cost concepts, fixtures, and fit checks when layer-dependent behavior and achievable finish are acceptable.
applicability: Fast, inexpensive geometric learning matters more than isotropic material behavior
The geometry can be oriented and supported for the selected machine and material
counterconditions: Fine finish, isotropy, watertightness, or validated production properties are essential without further qualification

alternatives.reason: SLS can better suit complex nylon parts when supportless powder-bed production and more uniform behavior justify it.

relationships.description: FDM is one process option for custom parts.
SLS is an additive alternative with different material and support behavior.
STL is a common triangulated handoff when the selected FDM workflow accepts it.

nodes.title: SLS additive manufacturing
nodes.summary: Powder-bed polymer additive manufacturing suited to complex durable nylon geometry and supportless nesting, with surface texture and powder-removal constraints.

recommendations.statement: Use SLS as a candidate for complex durable nylon parts when supportless nesting helps and grainy surface plus powder removal are acceptable.
applicability: Complex geometry benefits from surrounding powder support
Nylon material options and batch nesting fit the functional route
counterconditions: Fine cosmetic surface, sealed internal cavities, or trapped-powder geometry conflicts with the provider process

alternatives.reason: FDM may be faster and cheaper for early concepts and simple fit checks.

relationships.description: SLS is one process option for custom parts.
FDM is an additive alternative for inexpensive concepts and fit checks.
3MF can carry additive model units and metadata when the selected workflow accepts it.

nodes.title: CNC machining
nodes.summary: Subtractive production from stock with strong control over material, dimensions, and finish, bounded by cutter access, internal radii, workholding, depth, and fragile-feature constraints.

recommendations.statement: Use CNC machining when stock material properties, dimensional control, and machined finish justify subtractive access and workholding constraints.
applicability: The part is compatible with available stock and cutter access
Material, dimensional, or finish requirements favor machining
counterconditions: The geometry depends on inaccessible cavities, perfectly sharp internal corners, or deep fragile features without a qualified method

alternatives.reason: Laser sheet cutting can be more direct for constant-thickness 2D profiles and bent sheet parts.

relationships.description: CNC machining is one process option for custom parts.
Sheet cutting is an alternative for planar constant-thickness geometry.
STEP solid geometry is a common neutral CNC quote and handoff artifact.

nodes.title: Laser sheet cutting and bending
nodes.summary: Fabrication of constant-thickness 2D profiles, optionally followed by provider-supported bending, where flat geometry, closed contours, stock thickness, and bend setup define viability.

recommendations.statement: Use laser sheet cutting for clean constant-thickness 2D profiles and provider-supported bends, with revisioned flat geometry and live material-thickness constraints.
applicability: The part can be represented as a planar cut profile or supported bent sheet
Constant stock thickness is compatible with the design
counterconditions: The geometry requires enclosed 3D volumes, partial-depth features, or unsupported forming operations

alternatives.reason: CNC machining is an alternative when solid 3D features or partial-depth machining are required.

relationships.description: Sheet cutting is one process option for custom parts.
CNC machining is an alternative for non-planar solid geometry.
DXF is a common 1:1 profile artifact for 2D cutting workflows.
